notices.title: Plugin version-drift check reinstated
notices.message: 3.7.0 removed the SessionStart version-drift check, trusting Claude Code's native plugin auto-update. Testing showed the native mechanism downloads new plugin versions but never applies them (claude-code#52218, closed not-planned), so stale plugins load forever with no signal. The drift check is back: it writes paste-ready update commands to .claude/<marketplace>/plugin-updates.md when your installed plugins fall behind the marketplace. Run those commands manually — 'claude plugin update <plugin>@<marketplace>' is currently the only path that actually applies updates.

notices.title: Real-time message classifier removed
notices.message: The UserPromptSubmit classifier and its signals queue are gone — Claude Code's native auto memory captures in-session corrections now, and /thinking:retrospective reads transcripts directly. You can delete leftover .claude/<marketplace>/learnings/signals/pending.jsonl files (patterns.json stays; it feeds the retrospective analyser).

notices.title: adhd-mode now delivers via output style
notices.message: adhd-mode is now a native output style applied automatically while the plugin is enabled (no longer installed rules, no longer requires thinking). Stale installed copies of its old rule under .claude/rules/ are removed on next rule install.
